description_long: This is a rustic wooden fence constructed from roughly hewn logs, featuring four horizontal rails attached to three vertical posts. The rails are uneven and slightly curved, giving the fence a natural, handcrafted appearance. The wood shows visible grain and weathering, with a mix of brown and grayish tones, suggesting outdoor exposure. The posts are round and unadorned, with no decorative caps or finials. There are no visible fasteners or metal components, and the structure appears to be assembled using traditional joinery. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for marking boundaries in parks, gardens, or along urban greenways.
description: A rustic, weathered wooden fence with four uneven horizontal rails and three round vertical posts, showing natural grain and outdoor wear. The design is simple and handcrafted, with no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the fence, with all four horizontal rails and three vertical posts clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence, with the rails and posts aligned and little depth visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the rails and posts from the opposite side, highlighting the unevenness of the rails.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the alignment of the rails and posts.
